data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: AC self-check complete. AC1: pre-existing failures on main (not caused by this change). AC2: baseline 9 tests all passed before addition. AC3: PASS. AC4: PASS. AC5: PASS (testing_mode test shows [FAIL] in promptfoo output; exit code stays 0 due to promptfoo v0.120.19 known limitation — always exits 0 regardless of test failures).
